data.content: Implementation blocked: hard dependencies knots-41ba (domain scope fields), knots-7dda (scope events), and knots-ee7d (scope projection) are all still in ready_for_planning. Verified no scope_volume/scope_reliability/scope_scale references exist anywhere in the codebase, so CLI flags would have nowhere to write. Per planner's note, returning to ready_for_implementation; should not be re-claimed for implementation until 41ba/7dda/ee7d are SHIPPED or merged into main.
